basic_details.job_title: Akashvani Cuttack Casual Broadcast Assistants Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Akashvani Cuttack has released the official Casual Broadcast Assistants Notification 2026 at Akashvani Official Website. Vacancies have been announced under the Akashvani Cuttack Casual Broadcast Assistants Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 21 to 50 years with a Bachelor’s Degree along with Degree/Diploma in Journalism and Mass Communication, Audio-Video Editing, Cinematography, or Sound Engineering can apply offline up to 15 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 50 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in any discipline with a Degree/Diploma in Journalism and Mass Communication, Audio-Video Editing, Cinematography, or Sound Engineering. Proficiency in Odia/Hindi/English, knowledge of computer applications, and practical provisioning knowledge in audio editing capability, proficiency in Odia, English and Hindi typing.
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in any discipline from a recognized university or institution, along with a Degree/Diploma in Journalism and Mass Communication, or Audio-Video Editing, or Cinematography, or Sound Engineering. Proficiency in Odia/Hindi/English. Knowledge of computer applications. Practical provisioning knowledge in audio editing capability, proficiency in Odia, English and Hindi typing.

selection_process: Written test on general knowledge and current affairs. Practical proficiency test in computer operations for various audio/video formats.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Akashvani Cuttack Casual Broadcast Assistants Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.newsonair.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Akashvani Cuttack Casual Broadcast Assistants posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Casual Broadcast Assistants posts at Akashvani Cuttack is 15th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for Casual Broadcast Assistants?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in any discipline along with a Degree/Diploma in Journalism and Mass Communication, Audio-Video Editing, Cinematography, or Sound Engineering. Proficiency in Odia/Hindi/English and computer skills are also necessary.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for Casual Broadcast Assistants is between 21 to 50 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Akashvani Cuttack Casual Broadcast Assistants posts?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post/courier to the specified address before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. General category candidates need to pay Rs. 354/-, while SC/ST/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 266/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for Casual Broadcast Assistants?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a written test on general knowledge and current affairs, followed by a practical proficiency test in computer operations for various audio/video formats.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Casual Broadcast Assistants position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Casual Broadcast Assistants position has not been specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Akashvani, which is www.newsonair.gov.in.

faq.question: Q9. What are the required computer skills for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have knowledge of computer applications and practical provisioning knowledge in audio editing capability. Proficiency in Odia, English, and Hindi typing is also required.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply through online mode?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is strictly offline. Online applications will not be accepted.
